form.formComment: Returns from the paddock today. Finished off last campaign didn't finish the race at Chepstow December 6 over 4700m. First up last campaign 3 of 7 runners at Newcastle November 14 over 4700m, 8 len behind Highland Fashion carrying 76kg at $10. Expect her to be prominent.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-10). Returns from the paddock today. Finished off last campaign didn't finish the race at Chepstow December 6 over 4700m. First up last campaign 3 of 7 runners at Newcastle November 14 over 4700m, 8 len behind Highland Fashion carrying 76kg at $10. Expect her to be prominent.

form.formComment: Second-up today. First-up after four months finished fourth of 8 runners at Exeter on March 22 over 4600m, 5.5 len behind Kayf Dancer with 75.5kg at $11. Previously second-up didn't finish the race at Bangor-On-Dee on October 27 over 4600m. Fitter and expected to go close this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-10). Second-up today. form.formComment: Resumes off a 49 day letup. Last start finished eighth of 10 runners at Wetherby on February 26 over 4830m, on slow going 179 len behind Blue Carpet carrying 72kg at $7.50. The run before made ground from midfield; finished ninth of 17 starters at Newbury on January 14 over 4900m, 20 len behind C'est Different with 74kg at $7.50. A disappointment who is hard to have on recent efforts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-12.5). Resumes off a 49 day letup. Last start finished eighth of 10 runners at Wetherby on February 26 over 4830m, on slow going 179 len behind Blue Carpet carrying 72kg at $7.50. The run before made ground from midfield; finished ninth of 17 starters at Newbury on January 14 over 4900m, 20 len behind C'est Different with 74kg at $7.50. A disappointment who is hard to have on recent efforts.

form.formComment: Resuming after five months. Finished off last preparation 4 of 9 runners at Warwick November 19 over 5000m, slow track; 0.8 len behind Gwennie May Star carrying 71.5kg at $13. First up last campaign 7 of 8 starters at Worcester September 26 over 4600m, 12 len behind Theatre Of Flight carrying 75kg at $7.50. Expecting a bright return.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Resuming after five months. First up last campaign 7 of 8 starters at Worcester September 26 over 4600m, 12 len behind Theatre Of Flight carrying 75kg at $7.50. Expecting a bright return.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after two months finished third of 12 runners at Chepstow on April 2 over 3900m, 10 len behind Authentic Legacy carrying 72kg at $29. Previously second-up finished fourth of 9 starters at Plumpton on November 17 over 4100m, 29 len behind Goodwin with 66kg at $4.60. Holds ability to test the top fancies.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Last start ran last in a small field at Market Rasen on March 15 over 4600m, 51 len behind Escapologist carrying 74kg at $12. At only start last preparation pulled up at Wetherby on December 27 over 4800m. Tougher task this time.
